ddls:
CREATE TABLE "phenotypes" (
  "phecode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phenotype */,
  "phecode" TEXT /* PheCode of the phenotype */,
  "phenotype_description" TEXT /* Description of the phenotype */,
  "phenotype_category" INTEGER /* Category ID of the phenotype */,
  "number_of_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases in the study */,
  "number_of_controls" INTEGER /* Number of controls in the study */,
  "number_of_excluded_controls" INTEGER /* Number of excluded controls in the study */,
  "url_summary" TEXT /* URL to download the summary data file */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic location where the phenotype was studied */,
  "study_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "study_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "research_team" TEXT /* Name of the research team or principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the study */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Publication status of the study results */,
  "publication_link" TEXT /* Link to the published paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phecode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phenotypes_phenotype_category FOREIGN KEY ("phenotype_category") REFERENCES phenotype_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phenotype_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID for hierarchical structure */,
  "category_color" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "phecode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phenotype the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of data file (e.g., CSV, TXT, JSON) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., compressed, uncompressed) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., hospital, lab, public database) */,
  "data_license" TEXT /* License under which the data is shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_phecode_id FOREIGN KEY ("phecode_id") REFERENCES phenotypes ("phecode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qq_plots" (
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each QQ plot */,
  "phecode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phenotype the plot belongs to */,
  "plot_url" TEXT /* URL to the QQ plot image */,
  "plot_size" REAL /* Size of the plot image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the plot was uploaded */,
  "plot_type" TEXT /* Type of QQ plot (e.g., standard, log-log) */,
  "plot_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the plot */,
  "plot_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for easier search and filtering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qq_plots_phecode_id FOREIGN KEY ("phecode_id") REFERENCES phenotypes ("phecode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manhattan_plots" (
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Manhattan plot */,
  "phecode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phenotype the plot belongs to */,
  "plot_url" TEXT /* URL to the Manhattan plot image */,
  "plot_size" REAL /* Size of the plot image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the plot was uploaded */,
  "plot_type" TEXT /* Type of Manhattan plot (e.g., standard, log-log) */,
  "plot_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the plot */,
  "plot_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for easier search and filtering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manhattan_plots_phecode_id FOREIGN KEY ("phecode_id") REFERENCES phenotypes ("phecode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* User's affiliation (e.g., university, hospital) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* User's contact number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "phecode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phenotype being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the phenotype */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the phenotype was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_phecode_id FOREIGN KEY ("phecode_id") REFERENCES phenotypes ("phecode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
